title: IITM Pravartak Unveils Advanced AI Program for Enterprise-Ready Talent
summary:
As global enterprises pivot from exploratory AI projects to integrating robust, production-grade artificial intelligence into their daily operations, the critical demand for specialized talent capable of building and deploying these complex systems has surged. This industrial shift necessitates a workforce proficient not just in AI theory, but in its practical, scalable, and secure application.

Responding to this urgent industry need, IITM Pravartak has announced the commencement of Batch 03 for its highly anticipated Applied Artificial Intelligence and Deep Learning Programme. This intensive curriculum is specifically engineered to equip professionals with cutting-edge skills across a spectrum of crucial AI domains, ensuring they can translate innovative concepts into tangible enterprise solutions.

The comprehensive program delves into core machine learning and deep learning methodologies, extending into vital areas like MLOps for efficient model deployment and management, and robust cybersecurity practices tailored for AI systems. Crucially, it also encompasses the rapidly evolving fields of Generative AI, large language models (LLMs), and agentic AI systems, preparing participants for the forefront of AI innovation.

This initiative holds significant importance as it directly addresses the prevalent gap between academic AI research and real-world industrial implementation. By focusing on practical application and the operational aspects of AI, the program empowers participants to contribute immediately to enterprise AI strategies, ensuring secure, scalable, and effective deployments in diverse business environments. It moves beyond theoretical understanding to practical mastery.

Looking ahead, the success of such programs is poised to profoundly impact the talent landscape, accelerating the adoption and maturation of AI within various sectors. Graduates will form a vital cohort of AI builders, driving innovation, enhancing operational efficiencies, and enabling companies to harness the full transformative potential of artificial intelligence in a responsible and impactful manner.
description: IITM Pravartak launches Batch 03 of its advanced AI program, aiming to equip professionals with enterprise-ready skills in machine learning, generative AI, and MLOps.

title: IITM Pravartak Unveils Next-Gen AI Program for Enterprise-Ready Talent
summary:
IITM Pravartak is once again stepping up to bridge the critical talent gap in artificial intelligence, announcing the third iteration of its highly specialized Applied Artificial Intelligence & Deep Learning Programme. This initiative aims to cultivate a new generation of professionals ready to build and deploy sophisticated AI solutions in real-world enterprise environments.

As industries globally race to integrate AI, the demand for professionals capable of building and deploying production-grade systems has exploded. Recognizing this imperative, IITM Pravartak has established itself as a pivotal force in developing cutting-edge AI expertise, with its prior batches successfully equipping participants for real-world challenges across various sectors.

The newly launched Batch 03 is designed to deliver a comprehensive curriculum tailored for the modern enterprise. Participants will delve deep into core machine learning and advanced deep learning techniques, alongside crucial operational aspects like MLOps. Significantly, the program will also address the forefront of AI innovation, including Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), agentic AI systems, and robust AI cybersecurity practices, ensuring a holistic understanding.

This initiative is particularly vital given the current landscape where many AI projects falter not from lack of ideas, but from a scarcity of talent skilled in translating theoretical models into scalable, secure, and deployable enterprise solutions. By focusing on production-grade capabilities, IITM Pravartak aims to empower a new cohort of professionals to directly impact organizational digital transformation and innovation pipelines.

The continuous output of highly skilled AI practitioners from programs like this will undoubtedly accelerate AI adoption across sectors, from finance to healthcare, and manufacturing. These graduates are poised to become architects of the next generation of intelligent systems, potentially setting new benchmarks for efficiency and innovation and solidifying India’s position as a hub for advanced AI development.
description: IITM Pravartak is launching its third cohort of an advanced AI and deep learning program, aiming to cultivate production-grade talent for the evolving enterprise landscape.

title: COMPUTEX 2026 Forges Unified AI Ecosystem as Global Innovation Converges
summary:
COMPUTEX 2026 has successfully concluded, marking a pivotal moment in the evolution of artificial intelligence and its widespread integration. Under the resonant theme 'AI Together,' the world's premier exhibition for connected intelligence and emerging startup innovation brought together an unparalleled assembly of global technology leaders and pioneering startups, collectively charting a course for the future of AI. The event served as a dynamic crucible where the next generation of intelligent systems was not just conceptualized but tangibly demonstrated.

Historically, COMPUTEX has been a bellwether for the tech industry, evolving from its roots as a hardware showcase to become a critical platform for defining the landscape of AI-driven internet of things (AIoT) and fostering groundbreaking entrepreneurial ventures. This year's iteration continued that legacy, solidifying its role as the definitive stage where the future of computing, mobility, and human-machine interaction is unveiled to the world.

The core of COMPUTEX 2026 revolved around three transformative pillars: advanced AI Computing, the future of Robotics & Intelligent Mobility, and a broad spectrum of Next-Generation Technologies. Attendees witnessed firsthand the unveiling of breakthroughs in neural processing, autonomous systems, and innovative interfaces, all demonstrating the profound impact of AI across diverse sectors. The collaborative spirit fostered genuine partnerships, showcasing a collective drive towards more integrated and intelligent solutions.

This convergence matters immensely as it signifies more than just product launches; it represents the solidification of a new global AI ecosystem. The insights shared and collaborations initiated at COMPUTEX 2026 are poised to accelerate development, drive market trends, and set new benchmarks for innovation. It underscored a shared vision that AI's true potential is unlocked through unified effort and open exchange, rather than isolated advancements.

Looking ahead, the reverberations of COMPUTEX 2026 will undoubtedly shape the technological agenda for years to come. The seeds of innovation sown here will blossom into new industries, refined solutions, and a more interconnected intelligent world. The event has laid a clear foundation, signaling that a future where AI is not just pervasive but harmoniously integrated across all facets of life is rapidly approaching, driven by the collaborative ethos championed this week.
description: COMPUTEX 2026 successfully concluded, bringing together global tech leaders and startups to unveil groundbreaking AI advancements and define the trajectory of a collaborative new intelligence ecosystem.

title: Self-Taught 19-Year-Old Disrupts AI Education with Rs 1 Crore Venture
summary:
The tech world is abuzz with the extraordinary success story of Ayush Singh, a 19-year-old entrepreneur who has built an Artificial Intelligence education business generating an astounding Rs 1 crore in monthly revenue. His remarkable achievement underscores a powerful narrative about talent, tenacity, and the shifting landscape of professional credentialing in the digital age.

Singh's journey began at the tender age of 13, driven by a profound family financial crisis. It was during this challenging period that he immersed himself in the complexities of machine learning, entirely self-taught, without the traditional academic frameworks often seen as prerequisites for such advanced technical expertise. This early, independent dive into AI laid the foundational skills for his future empire.

Leveraging his deep, self-acquired knowledge, Ayush established an AI education venture designed to empower others with practical machine learning skills. What started as an individual’s passion quickly scaled into a formidable enterprise, demonstrating a keen understanding not only of AI but also of market demand for accessible, high-quality technical training. The business’s rapid ascent to a Rs 1 crore monthly turnover is a testament to its effectiveness and Ayush's entrepreneurial acumen.

This narrative is significant for several reasons. It dramatically highlights that groundbreaking success in cutting-edge fields like AI is no longer exclusively the domain of graduates from elite institutions. Singh's story champions the immense potential of self-directed learning and practical application, proving that passion and skill can supersede formal degrees. For the broader tech industry, it signals a powerful shift towards valuing demonstrated capability over conventional qualifications.

Looking ahead, Ayush Singh's trajectory could inspire a new generation of entrepreneurs to forge their own paths, bypassing traditional educational routes and directly engaging with the demands of the modern tech economy. His success also points to a growing market for specialized, practical AI training, suggesting that the future of skill acquisition will be increasingly agile, accessible, and driven by individuals who can transform self-education into an impactful commercial force.
description: Meet Ayush Singh, the 19-year-old prodigy who turned self-taught machine learning skills into a staggering Rs 1 crore-a-month AI education business, challenging traditional tech pathways.

title: 5.2 tops OpenAI’s GPT 5.5 model on key benchmarks
summary: Chinese startup Z.ai has launched GLM-5.2, a powerful AI model for complex coding projects. This new large language model boasts a massive 1 million token context window, allowing it to handle extensive software development tasks. GLM-5.2 is available under an open-source license, offering an alternative to proprietary AI systems. It performs strongly on industry benchmarks, rivaling top closed-source models.

title: WhatsApp Throne for Shah Sends a Message
summary: Mark Zuckerbergs move to hire Kunal Shah to head WhatsApp is a clear statement of intent — the Meta boss wants the dominant messaging service to lead an aggressive push into financial services and catalyse his ambitious bet on artificial intelligence, driving the platforms next growth phase a decade after being acquired by the Facebook parent.

title: Legal tech firm sues US over order limiting foreign access to top-tier Anthropic models
summary: A U.S. legal technology company on Tuesday sued the federal government, challenging a directive by President Donald Trump’s administration that resulted in ​the artificial intelligence firm Anthropic halting access to two of its ‌most advanced models for users worldwide.

summary: The normalization of using AI for writing threatens the essence of the writing process, which is not just about producing a document but also about learning, critical thinking and self-improvement.

title: Sprout Solutions to stage annual ‘State of HR Summit 2026’
summary: SPROUT Solutions, the Philippines’ leading homegrown HR and payroll technology company, will hold the State of HR Summit 2026 at Dusit Thani Manila on July 8, bringing together HR leaders, business executives and people managers to discuss how organizations can accelerate performance with artificial intelligence (AI) while remaining people-first.

title: India Carves Out Pivotal Role in AI Landscape
summary:
India is rapidly establishing itself as a significant force in the global artificial intelligence (AI) ecosystem, increasingly viewed as an emerging third pillar alongside established leaders. This signals a diversification of global AI development and influence.

This strategic ascendance is underpinned by several key factors. India boasts a vast talent pool of engineers and data scientists, complemented by a booming digital economy and a substantial user base for technological adoption. Government initiatives, including supportive policies for digital infrastructure and dedicated AI research and development programs, have further catalyzed this growth, fostering an environment ripe for innovation and technological advancement across various sectors.

Recent assessments highlight India’s evolution from primarily an IT services provider to a crucial contributor in high-value AI product development and solutions. This shift is evident in the strategic application of AI across sectors such as healthcare, agriculture, finance, and smart cities, where technology is being leveraged to address unique socio-economic challenges and drive efficiency.

India's strengthening position holds profound implications for the worldwide AI landscape. It introduces a fresh perspective and a new nexus of innovation, potentially leading to more diverse AI applications and ethical frameworks tailored to a broader range of global needs. This fosters a more balanced distribution of AI expertise and economic power, promoting healthy competition and collaborative opportunities previously concentrated among fewer nations.

Looking ahead, India’s trajectory suggests continued expansion in AI capabilities, marked by increased investment in cutting-edge research, advanced skill development, and robust international partnerships. Its role is expected to deepen, influencing global AI governance, contributing significantly to open-source AI initiatives, and pioneering scalable AI solutions applicable to diverse global contexts, especially in emerging markets.
description: India is rapidly positioning itself as a crucial third force in the global artificial intelligence arena, driven by its vast talent pool, digital economy, and strategic government initiatives.

title: West Bengal Finance Minister Outlines Bold Economic Shift in Maiden Budget
summary: West Bengal Finance Minister Swapan Dasgupta unveiled his administration's inaugural budget, immediately signaling a profound pivot in the state's economic direction. Addressing the legislative assembly, Dasgupta asserted that the new BJP government inherited an "abnormal state" of affairs, declaring a clear intent to transition West Bengal towards an "aggressively market economy." The remarks come as the newly installed BJP government takes the reins in West Bengal, following a period characterized by different economic approaches. The incoming administration's assessment of the previous economic environment as "abnormal" underscores a perceived need for fundamental structural changes, setting the stage for a distinct economic philosophy to guide the state's future. During the presentation of the state's financial blueprint, Minister Dasgupta articulated a vision centered on fostering robust market mechanisms. His declaration of pursuing an "aggressively market economy" signifies a strategic move towards policies that are likely to prioritize private sector growth, attract investments, and enhance economic liberalization, potentially diverging significantly from past governmental interventions. This stated commitment to an "aggressively market economy" represents a critical ideological and practical shift for West Bengal. It suggests a departure from more centrally controlled economic models, aiming instead to unleash market forces to drive growth and development. For businesses and investors, it signals a potentially more open and conducive environment for commerce and industry, impacting job creation and wealth generation within the state. The proposed economic transformation could lead to significant changes in West Bengal's economic landscape. Future impacts may include accelerated industrial growth, increased foreign and domestic investment, and a greater emphasis on efficiency and competition across various sectors. However, the successful implementation of such reforms will depend on navigating potential challenges related to social equity, labor considerations, and ensuring a stable regulatory framework to support the new economic paradigm.
description: West Bengal's newly appointed Finance Minister, Swapan Dasgupta, has announced a significant shift in the state's economic policy, moving towards an "aggressively market economy" to rectify an "abnormal state" inherited by the BJP government. This strategic declaration, made during his first budget presentation, indicates a strong push for economic liberalization and private sector growth in the state.
